title: Velvety Thai Carrot Stir-fry
description: A tangy and velvety twist on traditional stir-fry featuring roasted carrots as the star vegetable, perfect for a lazy Sunday dinner that's nut-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon fish sauce (or coconut aminos for nut-free option)

instructions: Rinse and julienne the carrots into thin strips.
Arrange the carrot strips on a baking sheet and roast for 15 minutes, or until tender and slightly caramelized. Remove from oven and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, lime juice, minced garlic, fish sauce (or coconut aminos), sugar, green onions, and basil leaves. Stir well to combine all ingredients.

Return the roasted carrots to your pan or a skillet with the dressing mixture, ensuring they're evenly coated. Cook over medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes until heated through and slightly thickened. Remove from heat.
Serving suggestions: Serve over steamed rice or noodles.
